title: FIFA World Cup 2026 — Engineered Match Dataset
subtitle: ELO, rolling form, H2H & squad values — WC 2026 ML prediction dataset

resources.description: Main feature table. One row per team per match (two rows per game). Covers men's international football from 2000 to 2025 across World Cups, Euros, qualifiers, friendlies, Copa América, AFCON and Nations League. Outcome label is from the perspective of the 'team' column. Use match_date for temporal train/val/test splits.

fields.name: match_id
fields.description: Unique match identifier: YYYYMMDD_HomeTeam_AwayTeam (string)

fields.name: match_date
fields.description: Date of the match (datetime)

fields.name: tournament
fields.description: Tournament name as recorded in martj42/international_results (string)

fields.name: tcat
fields.description: Tournament category: world_cup | euro | qualifier | friendly | other (string)

fields.name: team
fields.description: The team this row represents (canonical name, string)

fields.name: opponent
fields.description: The opposing team (canonical name, string)

fields.name: goals_for
fields.description: Full-time goals scored by 'team' (int)

fields.name: goals_against
fields.description: Full-time goals conceded by 'team' (int)

fields.name: is_home
fields.description: 1 if team played at home venue, 0 otherwise (binary int)

fields.name: is_neutral
fields.description: 1 if match was played at a neutral venue (binary int)

fields.name: is_knockout
fields.description: 1 if match was a knockout stage game (binary int)

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Match stage: group | round_of_16 | quarter_final | semi_final | final (string)

fields.name: outcome
fields.description: Target label from team's perspective: 0=Loss, 1=Draw, 2=Win (int)

fields.name: points
fields.description: Points earned: 3=Win, 1=Draw, 0=Loss (int)

fields.name: team_elo
fields.description: Team's pre-match ELO rating (K=20, home advantage=100, init=1500) (float)

fields.name: opp_elo
fields.description: Opponent's pre-match ELO rating (float)

fields.name: elo_diff
fields.description: team_elo minus opp_elo — single strongest predictor (float)

fields.name: form_5
fields.description: Rolling points sum over team's last 5 matches before this game (float)

fields.name: form_10
fields.description: Rolling points sum over team's last 10 matches before this game (float)

fields.name: form_diff_5
fields.description: form_5 minus opponent's form_5 — form advantage metric (float)

fields.name: form_diff_10
fields.description: form_10 minus opponent's form_10 (float)

fields.name: gf_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average goals scored per game over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: ga_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average goals conceded per game over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: gf_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average goals scored per game over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: ga_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average goals conceded per game over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: t_form_5
fields.description: Rolling points sum over last 5 matches in the SAME tournament category (float)

fields.name: t_gf_5
fields.description: Rolling avg goals scored over last 5 matches in same tournament category (float)

fields.name: t_ga_5
fields.description: Rolling avg goals conceded over last 5 matches in same tournament category (float)

fields.name: rest
fields.description: Days since team's previous match (clipped 1–365, default 14) (float)

fields.name: opp_rest
fields.description: Days since opponent's previous match (float)

fields.name: rest_diff
fields.description: rest minus opp_rest — positive means team is more rested (float)

fields.name: h2h_n
fields.description: Number of prior head-to-head meetings (max 10 recent) (int)

fields.name: h2h_wins
fields.description: Head-to-head wins for 'team' in prior meetings (int)

fields.name: h2h_draws
fields.description: Head-to-head draws in prior meetings (int)

fields.name: h2h_losses
fields.description: Head-to-head losses for 'team' in prior meetings (int)

fields.name: h2h_gf
fields.description: Total goals scored by 'team' in H2H meetings (float)

fields.name: h2h_ga
fields.description: Total goals conceded by 'team' in H2H meetings (float)

fields.name: confederation
fields.description: FIFA confederation of 'team': UEFA | CONMEBOL | CONCACAF | CAF | AFC | OFC (string)

fields.name: opp_confederation
fields.description: FIFA confederation of 'opponent' (string)

fields.name: same_conf
fields.description: 1 if both teams from the same confederation (binary int)

fields.name: squad_market_value
fields.description: Team's squad market value in € millions from Transfermarkt (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: squad_value_diff
fields.description: squad_market_value minus opponent's squad_market_value (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_win
fields.description: Bookmaker-implied win probability (from B365/PS odds where available, else NaN) (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_draw
fields.description: Bookmaker-implied draw probability (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_loss
fields.description: Bookmaker-implied loss probability (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_diff
fields.description: implied_prob_win minus implied_prob_loss — bookmaker edge (float)

resources.description: Aggregated squad market values per national team per year, sourced from the transfermarkt-datasets project (github.com/dcaribou/transfermarkt-datasets). Values are in millions of Euros. Join to match_features.parquet on team name + year(match_date) to add the squad_market_value feature.

fields.name: team
fields.description: Canonical national team name (string)

fields.name: year
fields.description: Year the valuation was recorded (int)

fields.name: squad_value
fields.description: Total squad market value in millions of Euros (float)

fields.name: n_players
fields.description: Number of players with valuations included in the sum (int)

resources.description: Mapping of canonical national team names to their Transfermarkt internal club IDs. Used to join squad valuations when fetching fresh data from the Transfermarkt API. Format: { "Argentina": 3437, "Brazil": 3439, ... }

fields.name: key
fields.description: Canonical team name (string)

fields.name: value
fields.description: Transfermarkt internal team ID (integer)

resources.description: Ordered list of feature column names used during XGBoost model training. Load this to ensure your feature matrix columns are in the correct order when making predictions. Format: [ "is_home", "is_neutral", ... ]

fields.name: value
fields.description: Feature column name as it appears in match_features.parquet (string)

resources.description: Sorted list of all 200+ canonical national team names seen during model training. Use for team name validation and lookup. Format: [ "Afghanistan", "Albania", ... ]

fields.name: value
fields.description: Canonical team name (string)

resources.description: Validation and test set performance metrics from the trained XGBoost + calibration pipeline. Validation = 2018 FIFA World Cup (64 matches). Test = 2022 FIFA World Cup (64 matches, held-out). Includes accuracy, log_loss, and Brier score.

fields.name: validation.accuracy
fields.description: Three-class accuracy on 2018 WC validation set (float, 0–1)

fields.name: validation.log_loss
fields.description: Multi-class log loss on 2018 WC (lower is better) (float)

fields.name: validation.brier
fields.description: Mean Brier score on 2018 WC (lower is better) (float)

fields.name: test.accuracy
fields.description: Three-class accuracy on held-out 2022 WC test set (float, 0–1)

fields.name: test.log_loss
fields.description: Multi-class log loss on 2022 WC test set (float)

fields.name: test.brier
fields.description: Mean Brier score on 2022 WC test set (float)

fields.name: high_confidence_test_acc
fields.description: Accuracy on matches where model confidence ≥ 55% (float, 0–1)
